name: Juan Dela Cruz
text: The best coffee in San Juan! The atmosphere is so cozy and the staff are incredibly friendly. My daily morning stop.

name: Maria Santos
text: I love their cold brew! It's the perfect refreshment before heading to the beach. Servus Cafe is a gem in Batangas.

name: Ricardo Reyes
text: A great place to work and enjoy a pastry. The chocolate croissant is a must-try. Highly recommend to everyone visiting!
